libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generate tests against the Jakarta 2.x namespace: use jakarta.activation.* imports, not javax.activation.* copied from the 1.2.1 tests.

deterministic_setup.reason: jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0 references com.sun.activation.registries classes and default mailcap/mimetype resources that are supplied by the implementation artifact; without it, meaningful runtime coverage can hit NoClassDefFoundError.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8769 [Automation] javac compile fails for jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The implementation artifact contains duplicate jakarta.activation classes in addition to the missing com.sun.activation classes, so Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
Tests that only exercise pure parsing/value APIs may pass with the API artifact alone, but they would miss common Activation runtime behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The API artifact is compile-oriented and omits com.sun.activation registry implementation classes/resources needed by normal Activation runtime paths such as MimetypesFileTypeMap and MailcapCommandMap.
